input.code:
# Load required libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)

# Read counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)

# Ensure counts is integer (DESeq2 requirement)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
mode(counts) <- "integer"

# Convert metadata$cell_type to factor with Monocyte as reference
metadata$cell_type <- factor(metadata$cell_type, levels=c('Monocyte', 'T_cell'))

# Check consistency
stopifnot(all(rownames(metadata) == colnames(counts)))

cat("Counts matrix:", dim(counts), "\n")
cat("Metadata:", nrow(metadata), "\n")
cat("Cell type levels:\n")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=counts, colData=metadata, design=~cell_type)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created:\n")
print(dds)
